The '''YT-450a''' was a clunky-looking [[Starship/Legends|starship]] from [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation's]] [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighters]]. It was slow and not very maneuverable in its stock configuration, but it could be modified to improve its power and weaponry.

{{Ship-stub}}
